---
title: "Little Lucy’s Wonderful Globe."
---

## Little Lucy’s Wonderful Globe.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1871
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

### Notes

This is a fictionalized geography book.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
